title: LACTATION CONSULTATION SERVICES - 211info
text: MCKENZIE-WILLAMETTE MEDICAL CENTER LACTATION CONSULTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breastfeeding support with access to a lactation consultant or registered nurse by phone or in person, as needed. 1460 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 726-4400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 726-4400 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - WOMEN'S HEALTH AND BIRTH CENTER INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MCKENZIE-WILLAMETTE MEDICAL CENTER
